signatureAbility.signatureDescription: Players with this ability are more likely to succeed at and attempt diving catches and swats.
Defenders with this ability generally react much faster to receiver cut moves when in man coverage and inside the numbers
Defenders with this ability force more catch knockouts and react quicker in deep zone coverage, 20+ yards from the LoS and outside the hash marks.
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win pull blocks
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability reduce a rusher's chances of using a quick block shed move while run blocking.
Freight Trains are relentless runners who refuse to go down on first contact. When they enter the zone, this ability increases their chance to break the next tackle.
Ballcarriers with this ability have more powerful stiff arm animations and have a larger timing window for landing perfect stiff arms.
Ballcarriers with this ability have an increased chance to break hit-stick tackle attempts made on them.
Locker room pep talks go a long way. Players with this ability can easily enter the Zone in the 2nd half.
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes 10-20 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
Receivers with this ability catch more consistently while catching passes less than 10 yards from the LoS, outside the numbers
Players with this ability have a chance to replenish their stamina, once per play, when it is half depleted
Blockers with this ability will frequently attempt and win impact blocks against linebackers and defensive backs when playing as a lineman or fullback.
Blockers with this ability defend against spin pass rush moves as if they had an additional resistance point
Defenders with this ability have a larger timing window for landing Perfect Hit Sticks
